idea-plugin.name: Kraken Rules
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Kraken .rules files (eisgroup/kraken-rules DSL).
  • Syntax highlighting
  • Code completion (keywords, payloads, @Dimension, rule names)
  • Inspections (rule without name, unresolved rule reference)
  • Intention: add missing 'On' clause
  • Navigation between EntryPoint items and Rule declarations
  • Rename refactoring for rules

This is an independent community plugin. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by EIS Group. "Kraken" refers to the open-source Kraken Rules engine (Apache-2.0).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.5.3
  • Fixed false-positive syntax errors on KEL type casts: "(Type) value", including the chained form "((Type) expr).field".
  • Removed deprecated IntelliJ stub API usages (StubBasedPsiElementBase.getElementType / StubElement.getStubType).
  • README translated to English.
0.5.2
  • Strict namespace semantics for reverse references: gutter icons, declaration-to-usage navigation, Find Usages and the unused-rule inspection now only count references whose namespace can actually see the declaration (mirrors the Kraken engine).
0.5.1
  • Ctrl+click on a Rule or EntryPoint declaration name now navigates to the entry point items referencing it (popup when several).
  • Find Usages now works reliably for multi-word names ("Policy code mandatory") via a dedicated references searcher.
0.5.0
  • Nested EntryPoint items ("EntryPoint \"X\"") are now real references: Ctrl+B navigation, rename refactoring, unknown-reference inspection, gutter icon on entry points included by others.
  • Reworked completion inside EntryPoint blocks: icons, origin file, other entry points suggested, already-listed items and the current entry point excluded.
0.4.1
  • Fixed false-positive syntax errors when Info/Error/Warn is used as a reference or context name in expressions ("Assert Info.additionalInfo = ...", "x instanceof Info") or as a function call ("Warn(x)").
  • The bundled grammar simulator (tools/sim_parser.py) now emulates Grammar-Kit pin semantics to catch this class of bug.
0.4.0
  • Stub-based index for rule declarations: reference resolution, completion and navigation no longer load file ASTs — fast on large projects (hundreds of .rules files).
0.3.0
  • Structured KEL expression grammar (ported from the official Kel.g4/Value.g4): if/then/else, for/return, every/some/satisfies, function calls, access chains with filters and spread (a.b[*].c[filter]), null-safe access (?. and ?[), exponent (**), collection literals, variable blocks (set x to ... return ...).
  • Field completion now also works inside expressions (When Policy.<caret>).
  • Grammar still validated 103/103 against the official kraken-rules corpus.
0.2.0
  • Structure view, code folding, code formatter and live templates (rule, ep, ctx, dim).
  • Field completion after "On Context." (inheritance-aware).
  • Namespace-aware resolution (Namespace / Include).
  • Gutter icon on rules referenced by entry points.
  • Quick documentation (Ctrl+Q) for rules.
  • New inspections: unknown context, duplicate rule, unused rule, undeclared dimension.
0.1.0
  • Initial release: syntax highlighting, code completion, inspections, intention action, navigation and rename refactoring for Kraken .rules files.
  • Grammar validated against the full test corpus of the official eisgroup/kraken-rules repository.

localInspection.displayName: Unresolved rule reference in entry point
Rule not referenced by any entry point
